MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Daniel Byrne, esq. as Trustee

The Court inquires if Ms. Tase received the money and how do we know whether she received it. Mr. Byrne stated his supplemental filing acknowledges she is alive, he has confirmation of the wire transfer from Albania, Albania does not accepts checks, he suspects she hasn't responded because she is elderly, he will keep pressing and the only leverage is to ask her to sign for last year and this year before he does the wire transfer for the next accounting.

The Court granted the Trustee's Seventh Account and Report; Petition for Approval of Account; and for Award of Compensation to Trustee (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee; Renunciation Of Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-09-2013 Continued To May-14-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Byrne in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that the Trust does not provide for the Former Trustee to nominate. Mr. Byrne explained that there are nine Beneficiaries mostly in Albania, that he has received two nominations, that he does not anticiapate any objections and that he expects to receive more nominations. Mr. Byrne also expressed concern about disruption in administration of the Trust and asked the Court to grant the petition. The Court suggested a 30-day continuance to see what comes in. The Petition for Order Confirming Successor Trustee, etc.was continued to may 14, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #12, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Apr-02-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES- ATTY. RAYMOND LEVY, PETITIONER IN PRO PER

MR. LEVY REPORTED TO THE COURT THAT THERE ARE 13 DIFFERENT BENEFICIARIES IN THE CASE. HE DOES NOT KNOW WHICH BENEFICIARIES ARE ALIVE OR NOT. THIS ALSO INVOLVE A COMPLEX INCOME TAX REPORT AND HE COULD NOT BRING OUTSIDE ATTORNEY TO HELP BECAUSE IT WILL DOUBLE THE AMOUNT OF EXPENSES. ACCORDING TO MR. LEVY THIS IS NOT A SIMPLE MATTER SINCE IN SCHEDULE A, THERE ARE NUMEROUS ENTRIES OF INCOME RECEIPTS AND ONE OF THE BENEFICIARY IS IN ALBANIA. HE ALSO INFORMED THE COURT WHETHER THIS MATTER IS BEING CONTINUED TO APRIL 15, 2008 OR ONLY AN ERROR? THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AND WILL NOTIFY MR. LEVY IF EVER IT WILL BE CONTINUED. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Leticia Perez, CSR 7782. Clerk: Cynthia Herbert. Bailiff: Deputy H. Harris.
